notes: Empirical falsification: PR101 microcodec decoder.bin (7 concatenated brotli q=11 streams, 162164 bytes total) is at the empirical entropy floor for the uint8 weight-byte distribution. Tested 4 alternative selectors: (1) per-stream best-of-{brotli q11, brotli q11 lg24, lzma XZ e9, lzma raw e9}: brotli wins all 7 streams (+0 bytes); (2) per-tensor split + best-of-3: +425 bytes envelope loss; (3) canonical magic_codec_dense_streams.encode_magic_codec_dense_streams: chose brotli for all 7 streams, payload 162401 bytes (+237 bytes); (4) constriction arithmetic-coding on raw byte streams: uniformly worse (+21148 bytes total). No alternative codec in the tac.packet_compiler.* inventory beats brotli q=11 on these specific tensor weight distributions. Op-routable #9 predicted -0.003 to -0.005 score improvement; empirical decoder.bin byte delta is 0 to +237 bytes (rate marginal 6.66e-7/byte => +0 to +0.00016 score regression). Lane DEFERRED-pending-new-primitive (NOT killed per CLAUDE.md Forbidden premature KILL). Next action: DEFER pending new entropy primitive in tac.packet_compiler.* with empirically proven savings on uint8 weight-byte distributions. Reactivation criteria: (1) new primitive in tac.packet_compiler.* lands AND (2) offline probe on decoder.bin streams 2,5,6 shows byte savings > envelope overhead (~76 bytes for 7-stream multi-stream container) AND (3) overall delta strictly <= -100 bytes (translates to score delta <= -7e-5).
